description_long: This house features a modern, multi-level design with clean lines and a flat roof, characterized by large glass windows and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, some of which are cantilevered or set back to create terraces and green spaces. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of light gray and natural wood, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. There are multiple outdoor areas, including a central courtyard and rooftop terrace, as well as green lawns integrated into the layout. The house includes expansive window walls that maximize natural light and provide visual connections between indoor and outdoor spaces. The driveway leads to a covered garage area, and the main entrance is accentuated by a prominent overhang and steps.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and integrated green spaces. The design features clean lines, white and gray surfaces, and multiple terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and central courtyard with large glass windows and a rooftop terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cantilevered sections, green lawn, and the integration of outdoor spaces with the house's volumes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extensive window walls, terraces, and the open layout of the backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the garage, additional green space, and the layered arrangement of the house's sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a prominent overhang, steps, and large glass door, integrated into a minimalist facade.
